metadata.name: NetBird Group
metadata.description: Creates a NetBird group and can optionally attach peers and network resources.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Creates a NetBird group and can optionally attach existing peers and network resources.

## Prerequisites
- Create an admin PAT for the NetBird management API before rendering `provider.tf`.
- If you attach peers, provide `peer_names` as a comma-separated list of existing NetBird peer names. The template resolves them with `data "netbird_peer"`.
- If you attach network resources, provide `resource_lookups` as a semicolon-separated list in the format `network_name|resource_name`. The template resolves the network with `data "netbird_network"` and each resource with `data "netbird_network_resource"`.

## Apply
- Render `provider.tf` and `main.tf`.
- Review the group name and optional resolved memberships.
- Run `terraform fmt`, `terraform plan`, and `terraform apply`.

## References
- [NetBird Groups](https://docs.netbird.io/how-to/manage-network-access#groups)
- [Terraform Resource](https://github.com/netbirdio/terraform-provider-netbird/blob/main/docs/resources/group.md)
- [Peer Data Source](https://github.com/netbirdio/terraform-provider-netbird/blob/main/docs/data-sources/peer.md)
- [Network Data Source](https://github.com/netbirdio/terraform-provider-netbird/blob/main/docs/data-sources/network.md)
- [Network Resource Data Source](https://github.com/netbirdio/terraform-provider-netbird/blob/main/docs/data-sources/network_resource.md)

items.name: netbird_management_url
items.title: Management URL
items.description: NetBird Management API URL. Trailing slashes are trimmed. TLS certificates must be trusted by the OpenTofu runner because the provider does not expose a skip-verification option.

items.name: netbird_tenant_account
items.title: Tenant Account
items.description: Optional tenant account ID for impersonation.

items.name: peer_names
items.title: Peer Names
items.description: Comma-separated existing NetBird peer names to attach to the group.

items.name: resource_lookups
items.title: Resource Lookups
items.description: Semicolon-separated `network_name|resource_name` entries for existing NetBird network resources to attach to the group.
